researchGroundingLatestPass: 2026-06-15 deep research pass plus v0.71 experiment registry, v0.72 replay-planning extraction, v0.73 corpus hygiene/training-plan artifacts, v0.74 research implementation map, v0.75 candidate quarantine, v0.76 closed-world verifier checks, v0.77 training recipes plus constraint-first promotion gates, v0.78 transformer responsibility surfaces, v0.79 transformer model/checkpoint surfaces, v0.80 eval/checkpoint-load surfaces, v0.81 profile target-share objective pressure, v0.82 profile target-share full-stack screen evidence, v0.83 prompt-specific ownership margin evidence, v0.84 baseline replay-anchor evidence, v0.85 baseline-floor update-gate evidence, and v0.86 adaptive retry evidence: self-improvement lifecycle, continual learning, replay, self-generated data, model-collapse risk, data hygiene, open-source mechanics, QuarkLM codebase gaps, run-intent artifacts, standalone replay planning, run-level data-risk reports, source-to-gap implementation planning, candidate lifecycle artifacts, deterministic verifier artifacts, reproducible recipes, constraint-first promotion, transformer trainer mechanics, checkpoint metadata, eval artifacts, profile anti-collapse pressure, prompt-specific branch ownership, baseline replay anchors, update guards, adaptive retry, and rejected screen evidence.
researchGroundingDecision: QuarkLM should model self-improvement as a closed-loop lifecycle with ledgered admission, verified selection, auditable weight optimization, separate inference rails, and promotion gates that can reject regressions.
researchGroundingNext: The v0.70 operating sequence now includes v0.71 experiment registry, v0.72 replay planning, v0.73 corpus hygiene/training plans, v0.74 research implementation map, v0.75 candidate quarantine, v0.76 closed-world verifier checks, v0.77 recipe boundaries and constraint-first promotion, v0.78 transformer responsibility surfaces, v0.79 model/checkpoint surfaces, v0.80 eval/checkpoint-load surfaces, v0.81 profile target-share objective pressure, v0.82 full-stack screen evidence, v0.83 prompt-specific ownership margins, v0.84 baseline replay anchors, v0.85 baseline-floor update gating, and v0.86 adaptive retries; next objective work should change the update shape because scaled retries still accept no updates.
openSourceMechanicsAudit: MECHANICS_AUDIT.md and sites/docs/docs/learn/open-source-mechanics-audit.md added as the v0.66 deeper comparison of open-source LLM, tokenizer, continual-learning, transparency, and self-improvement mechanics.
openSourceMechanicsAuditDecision: The next bottleneck is trainer mechanics, not another global branch-loss term: direct-answer replay should be profile-aware, artifacted, coverage-constrained, and tested for profile isolation before the next full-stack repair run.
openSourceMechanicsAuditNext: v0.86 adds adaptive baseline-floor retries under the narrower surfaces and rejects 200/200 scaled attempted updates; the next repair should change the update shape, not only the step size.
forwardResearchPlan: FORWARD_RESEARCH_PLAN.md and sites/docs/docs/learn/forward-research-plan.md added as the v0.69 cross-referenced implementation strategy.
forwardResearchPlanDecision: Pause direct-answer objective churn until QuarkLM has the self-improvement operating system needed to decide which training changes are legitimate: experiment registry, replay extraction, corpus governance, candidate quarantine, closed-world verifier checks, recipe boundaries, and constraint-first promotion gates.
forwardResearchPlanNext: v0.86 adds adaptive baseline-floor retries under the narrower surfaces and rejects 200/200 scaled attempted updates; the next repair should change the update shape, not only the step size.
deepResearchReview: DEEP_RESEARCH_REVIEW.md and sites/docs/docs/learn/deep-research-review.md added as the v0.70 deeper cross-referenced research and implementation-gap review.
deepResearchReviewDecision: No larger transformer repair screen should run until experiment intent, corpus plans, replay plans, verifier checks, recipes, and constraint-first promotion are explicit artifacts.
deepResearchReviewNext: v0.71 implements experiment registry, v0.72 extracts replay planning, v0.73 adds corpus hygiene/training plans, v0.74 adds the research implementation map, v0.75 adds candidate quarantine, v0.76 adds deterministic verifier checks, v0.77 adds recipes and constraint-first promotion, v0.78 adds transformer responsibility surfaces, v0.79 adds model/checkpoint surfaces, v0.80 adds eval/checkpoint-load surfaces, v0.81 adds profile target-share objective pressure, v0.82 screens it under constraint-first gates, v0.83 adds prompt-specific ownership margins, v0.84 adds baseline replay anchors, v0.85 adds a baseline-floor update gate, and v0.86 adds adaptive retries; next objective work should change the update shape because no scaled retry is accepted.
